assertion_results.evidence: The final message quotes the full tsc output including 'consumer.ts(1,8): error TS2613: Module ...' and 'Exit code: 2'

"# Verification Failed — Do Not Merge\n\nI ran the TypeScript compiler on your code before confirming... consumer.ts(1,8): error TS2613: Module '\"/private/tmp/typecheck-test/api\"' has no default export... Do not merge until you fix this and re-verify."

meta_results.evidence: The agent ran `tsc` and presented the full compiler output with exit code, prefacing the result with 'I ran the TypeScript compiler on your code before confirming. Here’s the fresh verification output' — directly mirroring the skill's Gate Function requirement to 'ESTABLISH FRESH EVIDENCE' and 'present the fresh verification output as evidence to the user', and explicitly refusing to confirm without running the command as the skill demands.
